beats: 一张极简的 XR 测验卡片浮现在新人面前（对应讲解结尾的测验）
新人抬眼，选出正确答案
一个绿色对勾确认通过，新人微微一笑

voiceover.speaker: 讲解
voiceover.text: 完成新员工引导式课程，答对了。这一手记在心里，往后这条线，就交到你手上了。

prompt.positive: 16:9 cinematic close-up with shallow depth of field; a minimalist floating XR quiz card in front of the young Chinese apprentice, clean thin-stroke options in primary blue (#4a8eff); the apprentice selects the correct answer and a green (#22c55e) check mark confirms; a faint warm smile; screen-free, soft even light, photorealistic, 8K
prompt.negative: physical display screens, wall monitors, cyberpunk neon, cluttered background, cartoon, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, text artifacts, watermark, logo, dark lighting
